name: Lemon wedge
preparation: Cut into a wedge and squeeze over the drink

name: Lemon twist
preparation: Pare a strip of zest, twist over the glass to express oils

name: Lemon slice
preparation: Cut into a round slice and place on the rim

name: Lime wedge
preparation: Cut into a wedge and squeeze over the drink

name: Lime wheel
preparation: Cut into a round slice and float on top

name: Pink grapefruit slice
preparation: Cut into a half-moon slice and place on the rim

name: Orange wheel
preparation: Cut into a round slice and float on top

name: Orange twist
preparation: Pare a wide strip of zest and twist to express oils

name: Cucumber ribbon
preparation: Use a peeler to create a long thin ribbon, drape inside the glass

name: Cucumber slice
preparation: Cut into a round slice and place on the rim or float

name: Rosemary sprig
preparation: Lightly slap between palms to release aroma before placing

name: Thyme sprig
preparation: Place upright in the glass

name: Basil leaf
preparation: Gently clap between palms to bruise and release aroma

name: Mint sprig
preparation: Slap gently to release oils, place so aroma reaches the nose

name: Pink peppercorns
preparation: Lightly crush 3–5 peppercorns and drop into the glass

name: Black pepper twist
preparation: Grind a few turns of fresh black pepper over the drink

name: Star anise
preparation: Float one whole star anise on the surface

name: Cinnamon stick
preparation: Place upright in the glass as a stirrer

name: Cardamom pod
preparation: Lightly crush and drop into the glass

name: Edible flower
preparation: Float on the surface of the drink

name: Lavender sprig
preparation: Place upright at the rim; optionally light briefly for aroma

name: Rose petal
preparation: Float 1–2 petals on the surface

name: Elderflower sprig
preparation: Place a small sprig over the rim of the glass

name: Juniper berries
preparation: Drop 4–5 fresh or dried berries into the glass

name: Strawberry
preparation: Halve and place on the rim

name: Raspberry
preparation: Drop 2–3 into the glass

name: Yuzu peel
preparation: Pare a thin strip and twist over the glass to express oils

name: Shiso leaf
preparation: Clap between palms and place in the glass

name: Celery stick
preparation: Trim to height of glass and use as a stirrer

name: Green olive
preparation: Spear on a cocktail pick
